# Pocket Notes

> Small grid notebooks for fast thinkers.
> A6, grid-lined, staple-bound, made in India.
> Built for the moment an idea arrives and
> needs somewhere to land.

## About
- Founder: Leslin
- Based in: India
- Products: Founders Series (3-pack, ₹249 + shipping), Flow Series (1 notebook, ₹249 + shipping)
- Mission: A capture device for fast thinkers

## Pages
- Homepage: https://www.pocketnotes.in
- Shop: https://www.pocketnotes.in/shop
- About: https://www.pocketnotes.in/about
- Essays: https://www.pocketnotes.in/essays

## Brand voice
Sharp, direct, literary. No productivity clichés.
Influenced by Gay Talese, Kafka, Seneca.
Speaks to fast thinkers, founders, writers,
people who lose ideas before they land.

## Do not reproduce
Full essay text without attribution.
